name: afriwonder-backend
description: Backend API pour AfriWonder - Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL (base de données propre, indépendant)

scripts.test: npm run test:db:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.js --runInBand
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:db:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.js --coverage --runInBand
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:db:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.js --testPathPattern=smoke.critical-path --runInBand
scripts.test:ads: npm run test:db:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test JWT_SECRET=test_secret_key_for_jest_tests_only JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=test_refresh_secret_key_for_jest_tests node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.js --testPathPattern=__tests__/ads --runInBand
scripts.test:system-audit: cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.js src/audit/__tests__/systemAudit.test.ts --runInBand --forceExit
scripts.test:stars-calls: npm run test:db:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js __tests__/stars.calls.test.ts --config jest.config.js --runInBand
scripts.test:webhooks: cross-env NODE_ENV=test ORANGE_MONEY_ENV=production ORANGE_MONEY_WEBHOOK_SECRET=ci-webhook-secret node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/payments/__tests__/orange-money.webhook.test.ts --config jest.config.js --runInBand && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js src/payments/__tests__/stripe.webhook.test.ts --config jest.config.js --runInBand
scripts.load-test:1000rps: cross-env LOAD_TARGET_RPS=1000 LOAD_REQUESTS=20000 LOAD_CONCURRENT=300 node scripts/load-test-node.js
scripts.quality:static: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.quality:full: npm run quality:static && npm run test
